title: ononis hircina var. spinosiformis
intro: Ononis hircina var. spinosiformis, also known as the spiny restharrow, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, and is characterized by its spiny stems and pink or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ononis hircina var. spinosiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage certain gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water or by using the plant's roots to create a decoction, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
